name: family practice doctors managing 50–100 patients/month tool
description: For family practice doctors processing 50–100 patients/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed patient follow-ups. We provide automated wellness report summaries instead of manual tracking and report generation.
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently track patient appointment history and generate wellness reports.
features: manual entry of patient appointment history
generation of basic wellness report summaries

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to efficiently track patient appointment history and generate wellness reports.
